response.global_analysis: Verification: 1. The Reference JSON states no vocal lyrics are present, but audio analysis reveals periodic vocal call-outs of the performers' names ('Okayu', 'Korone', 'Mio'). I am transcribing these as they are the only vocal elements. 2. I am omitting the static on-screen promotional text in the subtitles to strictly adhere to the Golden Rule: 'NEVER output text if there is no vocal audio driving it'. Timing is precisely aligned with the start of each vocal cord activation.
